clusters.neutral_headline: Protests in the Canary Islands as virus-stricken ship heads for port
bullet_summary: American passengers who left the MV Hondius cruise ship in April are being monitored for hantavirus in at least five states, health officials said
Health officials have identified at least eight confirmed or suspected cases of hantavirus tied to an outbreak on the M/V Hondius cruise ship
Five cases of hantavirus have been confirmed in total, including one of the three passengers on the MV Hondius who died
To imply it's a pandemic is dishonest,” they said

items.title: U.S. plans evacuation for Americans on cruise ship in hantavirus outbreak
items.standfirst: The MV Hondius is currently traveling to the Canary Islands, where the 147 people on board will be methodically off-boarded and flown home.
items.content: The MV Hondius is currently traveling to the Canary Islands, where the 147 people on board will be methodically off-boarded and flown home.

items.content: Protesters in Tenerife are voicing opposition to the imminent arrival of a cruise ship hit by hantavirus outbreak

items.title: 5 states monitoring passengers who departed ship stricken by hantavirus
items.standfirst: American passengers who left the MV Hondius cruise ship in April are being monitored for hantavirus in at least five states, health officials said.
items.content: American passengers who left the MV Hondius cruise ship in April are being monitored for hantavirus in at least five states, health officials said.

items.title: What we know about hantavirus cases tied to deadly cruise ship outbreak
items.standfirst: Health officials have identified at least eight confirmed or suspected cases of hantavirus tied to an outbreak on the M/V Hondius cruise ship.
items.content: Health officials have identified at least eight confirmed or suspected cases of hantavirus tied to an outbreak on the M/V Hondius cruise ship.

items.title: Americans on hantavirus cruise ship reportedly to be quarantined in US
items.standfirst: US CDC personnel are reportedly meeting ship in Canary Islands to accompany Americans on a flight to NebraskaThe US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) is reportedly sending personnel to the Canary Islands to meet the cruise ship affected by the hantavirus outbreak, with plans to accompany American passengers back to the US on a chartered flight and place them into quarantine in Nebraska.An additional CDC team is already headed to Nebraska, according to unnamed sources who spoke with CNN. The sources indicated that passengers are expected to undergo quarantine measures there to help prevent any possible spread of the virus. Nebraska is home to both the federally supported National Quarantine Unit and the Nebraska Biocontainment Unit. Continue reading...
items.content: US CDC personnel are reportedly meeting ship in Canary Islands to accompany Americans on a flight to NebraskaThe US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) is reportedly sending personnel to the Canary Islands to meet the cruise ship affected by the hantavirus outbreak, with plans to accompany American passengers back to the US on a chartered flight and place them into quarantine in Nebraska.An additional CDC team is already headed to Nebraska, according to unnamed sources who spoke with CNN. The sources indicated that passengers are expected to undergo quarantine measures there to help prevent any possible spread of the virus. Nebraska is home to both the federally supported National Quarantine Unit and the Nebraska Biocontainment Unit. Continue reading...

items.title: Third British national has suspected hantavirus infection, UK government says
items.standfirst: Five cases of hantavirus have been confirmed in total, including one of the three passengers on the MV Hondius who died.
items.content: Five cases of hantavirus have been confirmed in total, including one of the three passengers on the MV Hondius who died.

items.title: Countries across the world react after hantavirus strikes cruise ship
items.standfirst: Global health officials are monitoring passengers from a cruise ship struck by a deadly hantavirus outbreak. CBS News' Tom Hanson reports.
items.content: Global health officials are monitoring passengers from a cruise ship struck by a deadly hantavirus outbreak. CBS News' Tom Hanson reports.

items.title: French couple on hantavirus cruise ship says ‘no panic onboard’
items.standfirst: A French couple who is currently travelling on the MV Hondius, which was recently hit by a hantavirus outbreak, has issued a statement urging media not to “overdramatise” the situation, adding that there is “no panic” among the passengers onboard. "To call this an epidemic is wrong. To imply it's a pandemic is dishonest,” they said.
items.content: A French couple who is currently travelling on the MV Hondius, which was recently hit by a hantavirus outbreak, has issued a statement urging media not to “overdramatise” the situation, adding that there is “no panic” among the passengers onboard. "To call this an epidemic is wrong. To imply it's a pandemic is dishonest,” they said.

items.title: Contact tracing could be key in halting the spread of hantavirus. Here's how it works
items.standfirst: More than two dozen passengers left the cruise ship before the outbreak was identified. The race is on to connect with them to monitor their health — and the health of those they've interacted with.
items.content: More than two dozen passengers left the cruise ship before the outbreak was identified. The race is on to connect with them to monitor their health — and the health of those they've interacted with.(Image credit: lakshmiprasad S/iStockphoto)

items.title: Worldwide race to trace passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship
items.standfirst: About 12 countries have so far been linked to the hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius, as the UN health agency confirms at least five cases.
items.content: About 12 countries have so far been linked to the hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius, as the UN health agency confirms at least five cases.

items.title: What is hantavirus – and how worried should we be?
items.standfirst: Three passengers have died after being on board a hantavirus-hit cruise ship that had been heading for the Canary Islands.
items.content: Three passengers have died after being on board a hantavirus-hit cruise ship that had been heading for the Canary Islands.

items.title: American passengers aboard hantavirus-hit cruise ship will quarantine in Nebraska, CDC says
items.standfirst: A team from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention will meet American passengers aboard the cruise ship at the center of a hantavirus outbreak, an agency official confirmed to NBC News.“CDC is sending a team to the Canary Islands to meet the Americans on board the Dutch cruise ship,” the CDC official said.
items.content: A team from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention will meet American passengers aboard the cruise ship at the center of a hantavirus outbreak, an agency official confirmed to NBC News.“CDC is sending a team to the Canary Islands to meet the Americans on board the Dutch cruise ship,” the CDC official said.

items.title: Two Britons evacuated from hantavirus-hit ship ‘improving’ in hospital
items.standfirst: Man, 69, is in intensive care in Johannesburg, while expedition guide Martin Anstee, 56, receiving care in NetherlandsWhat is hantavirus?Two Britons who were medically evacuated from the hantavirus-hit cruise ship are improving, global health officials have said.A British passenger, understood to be a 69-year-old man, was taken to South Africa on 27 April and is receiving care at a private health facility in Sandton, Johannesburg. Continue reading...
items.content: Man, 69, is in intensive care in Johannesburg, while expedition guide Martin Anstee, 56, receiving care in NetherlandsWhat is hantavirus?Two Britons who were medically evacuated from the hantavirus-hit cruise ship are improving, global health officials have said.A British passenger, understood to be a 69-year-old man, was taken to South Africa on 27 April and is receiving care at a private health facility in Sandton, Johannesburg. Continue reading...

items.title: Contact tracing underway after passengers left ship before first reported hantavirus case
items.standfirst: The cruise ship at the center of the hantavirus outbreak is heading toward the Canary Islands in Spain. Contact tracing is underway in multiple countries including the United States after passengers left the ship before the first reported case. NBC News' Matt Bodner reports on the latest details from the outbreak.
items.content: The cruise ship at the center of the hantavirus outbreak is heading toward the Canary Islands in Spain. Contact tracing is underway in multiple countries including the United States after passengers left the ship before the first reported case. NBC News' Matt Bodner reports on the latest details from the outbreak.

items.title: How worried should we be about hantavirus?

items.content: Some passengers potentially exposed to hantavirus have already taken flights to numerous countries.

items.content: People on Tenerife in the Canary Islands have told the BBC they are concerned about the arrival of MV Hondius.

items.content: Even after the first death was announced, life on the cruise ship hit by a hantavirus outbreak continued as usual, a passenger told NBC News.

He was named on Wednesday evening as Martin Anstee, 56. Continue reading...

items.content: President Trump said the agreement will swap 1,000 prisoners from each country after Russia and Ukraine announced separate short-term ceasefire plans.

items.title: Trump announces three-day ceasefire between Ukraine and Russia
items.standfirst: US President Donald Trump on Friday announced a three-day ceasefire between Russia and Ukraine, starting on May 9. Aside from a pause in the fighting, the two warring sides will also engage in a prisoner swap, with 1,000 prisoners from each country.
items.content: US President Donald Trump on Friday announced a three-day ceasefire between Russia and Ukraine, starting on May 9. Aside from a pause in the fighting, the two warring sides will also engage in a prisoner swap, with 1,000 prisoners from each country.

clusters.title: Pentagon releases first batch of previously secret files documenting reports of UFOs
clusters.neutral_headline: The Pentagon Releases New Trove of Declassified UFO Files
bullet_summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said in a statement that the documents "have long fueled justified speculation — and it's time the American people see it for themselves
Reported by Guardian World, Wired, CBS News and others

items.title: Pentagon releases first batch of previously secret files documenting reports of UFOs
items.standfirst: Among the releases is a 1969 debrief of Buzz Aldrin stating he saw a ‘sizeable’ object close to the lunar surfaceThe Pentagon on Friday released an initial group of previously secret files documenting reports of UFOs – a move sought for decades by some.“These files, hidden behind classifications, have long fueled justified speculation – and it’s time the American people see it for themselves,” Pete Hegseth, the defense secretary, said in a statement posted on X. Continue reading...
items.content: Among the releases is a 1969 debrief of Buzz Aldrin stating he saw a ‘sizeable’ object close to the lunar surfaceThe Pentagon on Friday released an initial group of previously secret files documenting reports of UFOs – a move sought for decades by some.“These files, hidden behind classifications, have long fueled justified speculation – and it’s time the American people see it for themselves,” Pete Hegseth, the defense secretary, said in a statement posted on X. Continue reading...

items.title: The Pentagon Releases New Trove of Declassified UFO Files

items.content: The Defense Department has released a new trove of declassified documents about government UFO sightings.

items.title: Pentagon begins releasing UFO files: "It's time the American people see"
items.standfirst: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said in a statement that the documents "have long fueled justified speculation — and it's time the American people see it for themselves."
items.content: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said in a statement that the documents "have long fueled justified speculation — and it's time the American people see it for themselves."

items.title: Watch videos of possible UFOs from first batch of files released by Pentagon
items.standfirst: The Pentagon on Friday began releasing more unclassified files on UFOs and UAPs, including more than two dozen videos. Here are all the videos released in the first batch of files.
items.content: The Pentagon on Friday began releasing more unclassified files on UFOs and UAPs, including more than two dozen videos. Here are all the videos released in the first batch of files.

items.title: Pentagon releases first batch of ‘top secret’ UFO files
items.standfirst: The Pentagon on Friday released decades of previously classified UFO sightings recorded by the FBI and NASA and other federal agencies. At least two of the more than 160 documents date back to the 1940s and report sightings of flying "discs” and “saucers”.
items.content: The Pentagon on Friday released decades of previously classified UFO sightings recorded by the FBI and NASA and other federal agencies. At least two of the more than 160 documents date back to the 1940s and report sightings of flying "discs” and “saucers”.

clusters.title: Vatican stresses need for peace as Rubio meets pope amid strained relations
clusters.neutral_headline: Vatican stresses need for peace as Rubio meets pope amid strained relations
bullet_summary: Reported by Guardian World, France24, BBC World and others

items.title: Vatican stresses need for peace as Rubio meets pope amid strained relations
items.standfirst: US secretary of state speaks with Leo and officials after tensions following attacks by Trump over Iran warThe Vatican has said it raised the “need to work tirelessly in favour of peace” in talks with the US secretary of state, Marco Rubio, who is in Rome on a trip widely regarded as an effort to ease tensions after Donald Trump’s repeated criticisms of Pope Leo.Amid unprecedented strain on relations between the Holy See and Washington, Rubio was received by the pope on Thursday at the Apostolic Palace, before holding a series of meetings with Vatican officials Continue reading...
items.content: US secretary of state speaks with Leo and officials after tensions following attacks by Trump over Iran warThe Vatican has said it raised the “need to work tirelessly in favour of peace” in talks with the US secretary of state, Marco Rubio, who is in Rome on a trip widely regarded as an effort to ease tensions after Donald Trump’s repeated criticisms of Pope Leo.Amid unprecedented strain on relations between the Holy See and Washington, Rubio was received by the pope on Thursday at the Apostolic Palace, before holding a series of meetings with Vatican officials Continue reading...

items.title: 'Peacemaker' Rubio tries to appease pope over spat with Trump
items.standfirst: PRESS REVIEW – Friday, May 8: The Italian dailies mark Pope Leo XIV's first year at the Vatican, hailing his "discreet and collegial" papacy. US Secretary of State Marco Rubio meets with the pope in a bid to appease tensions after a public spat between the pontiff and US President Donald Trump. Also: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces major losses in local elections, British conservationist David Attenborough turns 100 and BTS grace the cover of Rolling Stone magazine.
items.content: PRESS REVIEW – Friday, May 8: The Italian dailies mark Pope Leo XIV's first year at the Vatican, hailing his "discreet and collegial" papacy. US Secretary of State Marco Rubio meets with the pope in a bid to appease tensions after a public spat between the pontiff and US President Donald Trump. Also: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces major losses in local elections, British conservationist David Attenborough turns 100 and BTS grace the cover of Rolling Stone magazine.

items.title: Marco Rubio meets Pope Leo amid tensions with Trump over Iran war
items.standfirst: Leo, the first American pontiff, drew Trump's ire after becoming a firm critic of the war and the administration's hardline immigration policies.
items.content: Leo, the first American pontiff, drew Trump's ire after becoming a firm critic of the war and the administration's hardline immigration policies.

items.title: Marco Rubio meets with Pope Leo after Trump’s criticism over Iran war
items.standfirst: Secretary of State Marco Rubio discussed the Middle East with Pope Leo at the Vatican on Thursday at an audience that follows President Donald Trump’s criticism of the first American pope over the Iran war.
items.content: Secretary of State Marco Rubio discussed the Middle East with Pope Leo at the Vatican on Thursday at an audience that follows President Donald Trump’s criticism of the first American pope over the Iran war.

items.title: Republicans, Democrats react after Virginia Supreme Court strikes down state's redistricting plan

items.content: Virginia's redistricting plan has been struck down by the state's highest court, a major blow to Democrats. CBS News' Fin Gómez reports.

items.title: Virginia Supreme Court tosses out congressional map that favored Democrats
items.standfirst: The congressional redistricting referendum was passed by Virginia voters last month and would have given Democrats a more favorable map.
items.content: The congressional redistricting referendum was passed by Virginia voters last month and would have given Democrats a more favorable map.

items.content: Referendum approving party’s plan to redraw congressional map is overturned by judges

items.title: Virginia Supreme Court strikes down Democrats’ redistricting plan in US

items.content: Virginia's top court blocks redistricting plan, handing Republicans a key win before crucial midterm elections.

items.title: Court rejects Virginia redistricting in a blow to Democrats' counter to Trump, GOP
items.standfirst: Virginia voters approved redistricting that could help Democrats pick up four House seats. Democrats said it was to counter the gains that Trump and the GOP have picked up in Republican-led states.
items.content: Virginia voters approved redistricting that could help Democrats pick up four House seats. Democrats said it was to counter the gains that Trump and the GOP have picked up in Republican-led states.(Image credit: Julia Demaree Nikhinson)

clusters.title: Substantial win for Nigel Farage's Reform UK in local elections
clusters.neutral_headline: ‘Leader of the pack’: Reform UK makes election gains, humiliating Labour
bullet_summary: Reported by France24, Al Jazeera, NBC World

items.title: Substantial win for Nigel Farage's Reform UK in local elections
items.standfirst: The labor party is on the ropes in England as the results of local elections being counted show the far-right making substantial gains. The governing party has lost control of a number of councils... and pressure is piling on Keir Starmer -- with some calling for the Prime Minister to resign. Details by FRANCE 24's correspondent in London, Bénédicte Paviot.
items.content: The labor party is on the ropes in England as the results of local elections being counted show the far-right making substantial gains. The governing party has lost control of a number of councils... and pressure is piling on Keir Starmer -- with some calling for the Prime Minister to resign. Details by FRANCE 24's correspondent in London, Bénédicte Paviot.

items.title: ‘Leader of the pack’: Reform UK makes election gains, humiliating Labour
items.standfirst: Keir Starmer's Labour has suffered a humiliating defeat as the hard right makes sweeping gains.
items.content: Keir Starmer's Labour has suffered a humiliating defeat as the hard right makes sweeping gains.

items.title: Hard-right party routs Starmer’s Labour in U.K. elections as Trump ally hails ‘historic shift’
items.standfirst: Early results Friday from nationwide elections in Britain suggested a historic drubbing for Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s Labour Party and sweeping gains for hard-right Reform U.K., led by Trump ally Nigel Farage.
items.content: Early results Friday from nationwide elections in Britain suggested a historic drubbing for Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s Labour Party and sweeping gains for hard-right Reform U.K., led by Trump ally Nigel Farage.

items.title: UAE says air defences engaging with Iranian attacks – as it happened
items.standfirst: This blog is now closedUS-Iran ceasefire under threat after exchange of strikes in strait of HormuzThe European Union is set to tell airlines the impact from the Iran war on tourism is not yet severe enough to justify emergency measures for the sector, draft EU guidelines seen by Reuters showed.“The current situation does not point to the need for dedicated measures for the tourism sector, unlike during the COVID-19 crisis,” said the draft EU guidelines, which the European Commission is due to publish on Friday. Continue reading...

Continue reading...

items.standfirst: Donald Trump says ceasefire remains in place despite strikes, with Iranian TV saying situation is ‘back to normal’The US and Iran exchanged fire late on Thursday in the most serious test yet of their month-long ceasefire.Iran accused the US of violating the ceasefire by targeting two ships at the strait of Hormuz and attacking civilian areas, as the US insisted it struck in retaliation.
